Global CORS filter.

countActiveApplicationsForUser(String) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.util.DataManager
统计指定 TA 当前有效申请数（pending + approved）。

统计指定 TA 已通过（approved）的申请数量。

D

DataManager - com.ta.util中的Classes
Data access and plain-text persistence gateway.
DataManager() - Classes的Constructor com.ta.util.DataManager
Constructs the DataManager, resolves the runtime data directory and ensures required files exist (creates defaults when needed).
DeadlineReminderSchedulerListener - com.ta.servlet中的Classes
Deadline reminder scheduler listener.
DeadlineReminderSchedulerListener() - Classes的Constructor com.ta.servlet.DeadlineReminderSchedulerListener
 
destroy() - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.CORSFilter
 
doFilter(ServletRequest, ServletResponse, FilterChain) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.CORSFilter
为响应注入 CORS 头并处理 OPTIONS 预检短路。
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.AdminServlet
Handles admin GET endpoints: dashboard, positions, ta-workload and export.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.ApplicationServlet
处理申请查询Classes GET 接口（审核列表、我的申请）。
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.LoginServlet
Handles session queries, role hints and logout requests (GET).
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.NotificationServlet
Handles notification read endpoints (list).
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.PositionServlet
Handles GET endpoints for position reads (lists and details).
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.UserServlet
Handles GET endpoints for user-related reads (profile, avatar, resume, approvals, etc.).
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.ApplicationServlet
处理申请写操作 POST 接口（提交、审核）。
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.LoginServlet
Handles login, register and forgot-password submissions (POST).
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.NotificationServlet
Handles notification write operations (/read, /read-all).
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.PositionServlet
Handles POST endpoints for position write operations (create, update, status change, publish).
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.servlet.UserServlet
Handles POST endpoints for user write operations (profile update, password changes, admin approvals and account status updates).

R

rejectPendingApplicationsForUser(String, String, String) - Classes中的Methods com.ta.util.DataManager
